summary: Stellar first set with a ripping Detroit Medley and a magical end to The Greatest Story, captured in a download worth the listen despite unknown recording source
review: The reviewer raves about this night as a kick‑off highlight of the fall tour, calling the first set one of their all‑time favorites from the ’80s. They point out the electric Detroit Medley and the joyous climax of The Greatest Story Ever Told, noting Jerry’s playful cue to Brent for an epic keyboard moment. While no specific technical details are given, the enthusiasm suggests a listenable recording.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 5‑star review praises the musical performance heavily; recording quality is not described, so rating leans on show quality with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewer implies the download is worthwhile, suggesting acceptable audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as an all‑time favorite with high energy and seamless transitions, especially the Detroit Medley and the uplifting ending of The Greatest Story.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for cueing Brent with a smile and eyebrow gesture, showing his playful stage presence.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent delivers a standout keyboard moment after Jerry’s cue, highlighted as a highlight of the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mention of meeting Billy (Bill Kreutzmann) backstage; no specific performance comments.
